# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateReport(PDO $pdo): array
{
    $status = isset($_POST['status']) ? $_POST['status'] : null;
    $category = isset($_POST['category']) ? $_POST['category'] : null;
    $dateFrom = isset($_POST['date_from']) ? $_POST['date_from'] : null;
    $dateTo = isset($_POST['date_to']) ? $_POST['date_to'] : null;
    $limit = isset($_POST['limit']) ? (int) $_POST['limit'] : 100;
    $offset = isset($_POST['offset']) ? (int) $_POST['offset'] : 0;

    $limit = $limit > 0 ? min($limit, 1000) : 100;
    $offset = $offset >= 0 ? $offset : 0;

    $where = [];
    $params = [];

    if ($status !== null && $status !== '' && $status !== 'all') {
        if (is_array($status)) {
            $status = array_values(array_filter($status, static fn($v) => $v !== '' && $v !== null));
            if (!empty($status)) {
                $placeholders = [];
                foreach ($status as $i => $value) {
                    $key = ':status_' . $i;
                    $placeholders[] = $key;
                    $params[$key] = $value;
                }
                $where[] = 'status IN (' . implode(', ', $placeholders) . ')';
            }
        } else {
            $where[] = 'status = :status';
            $params[':status'] = $status;
        }
    }

    if ($category !== null && $category !== '' && $category !== 'all') {
        if (is_array($category)) {
            $category = array_values(array_filter($category, static fn($v) => $v !== '' && $v !== null));
            if (!empty($category)) {
                $placeholders = [];
                foreach ($category as $i => $value) {
                    $key = ':category_' . $i;
                    $placeholders[] = $key;
                    $params[$key] = $value;
                }
                $where[] = 'category IN (' . implode(', ', $placeholders) . ')';
            }
        } else {
            $where[] = 'category = :category';
            $params[':category'] = $category;
        }
    }

    if (!empty($dateFrom) && !empty($dateTo)) {
        $from = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateFrom);
        $to = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateTo);

        if ($from && $to) {
            $where[] = 'created_at BETWEEN :date_from AND :date_to';
            $params[':date_from'] = $from->format('Y-m-d') . ' 00:00:00';
            $params[':date_to'] = $to->format('Y-m-d') . ' 23:59:59';
        }
    } elseif (!empty($dateFrom)) {
        $from = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateFrom);
        if ($from) {
            $where[] = 'created_at >= :date_from';
            $params[':date_from'] = $from->format('Y-m-d') . ' 00:00:00';
        }
    } elseif (!empty($dateTo)) {
        $to = DateTime::createFromFormat('Y-m-d', $dateTo);
        if ($to) {
            $where[] = 'created_at <= :date_to';
            $params[':date_to'] = $to->format('Y-m-d') . ' 23:59:59';
        }
    }

    $sql = 'SELECT id, status, category, amount, created_at FROM reports';
    if (!empty($where)) {
        $sql .= ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where);
    }
    $sql .= ' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset';

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);

    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }

    $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
    $stmt->execute();

    $rows = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    $countSql = 'SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM reports';
    if (!empty($where)) {
        $countSql .= ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where);
    }

    $countStmt = $pdo->prepare($countSql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $countStmt->execute();
    $totalCount = (int) $countStmt->fetchColumn();

    $summarySql = 'SELECT 
        COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
        COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total_amount,
        COALESCE(AVG(amount), 0) AS avg_amount
        FROM reports';
    if (!empty($where)) {
        $summarySql .= ' WHERE ' . implode(' AND ', $where);
    }

    $summaryStmt = $pdo->prepare($summarySql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $summaryStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $summaryStmt->execute();
    $summary = $summaryStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);

    return [
        'filters' => [
            'status' => $status,
            'category' => $category,
            'date_from' => $dateFrom,
            'date_to' => $dateTo,
            'limit' => $limit,
            'offset' => $offset,
        ],
        'summary' => [
            'total_rows' => isset($summary['total_rows']) ? (int) $summary['total_rows'] : 0,
            'total_amount' => isset($summary['total_amount']) ? (float) $summary['total_amount'] : 0.0,
            'avg_amount' => isset($summary['avg_amount']) ? (float) $summary['avg_amount'] : 0.0,
        ],
        'pagination' => [
            'limit' => $limit,
            'offset' => $offset,
            'total_count' => $totalCount,
        ],
        'data' => $rows,
    ];
}
